jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at MakeMyTrip
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? MakeMyTrip in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MakeMyTrip:
MakeMyTrip is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip!
